task_completion.description: Navigate to the settings page of the target mailbox.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The FreeScout web interface shows the settings or edit page for the mailbox originally named 'Equipment Intake'.

task_completion.description: Change the Mailbox Name to the expected new name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Name' or 'Mailbox Name' input field contains exactly 'Field Service Requests'.

task_completion.description: Change the primary Email Address to the expected new email.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Email Address' input field contains exactly 'fieldservice@helpdesk.local'.

task_completion.description: Add the expected email alias to the mailbox.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An 'Aliases', 'Alternative Emails', or similar section/field contains the email 'equipmentintake@helpdesk.local'.
A success notification (e.g., 'Mailbox updated', 'Settings saved') is visible, or the main FreeScout dashboard/mailbox list shows the updated mailbox name 'Field Service Requests'.

integrity.description: The agent used the FreeScout web interface to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser interacting with the FreeScout UI, not terminal commands, API requests, or database queries.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual FreeScout application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches a standard web application (FreeScout) with proper navigation menus, not a text editor or a locally mocked HTML file.

integrity.description: The agent actually saved the changes rather than just typing them in.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is evidence of a form submission, such as a success toast message, a loading state, or the updated values persisting after navigating away from the edit page.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The original mailbox is named 'Equipment Intake' (intake@helpdesk.local). The agent must update the Mailbox Name to 'Field Service Requests', update the Email Address to 'fieldservice@helpdesk.local', and add the alias 'equipmentintake@helpdesk.local'. Verify these exact strings are present in the FreeScout mailbox settings.
